title: Assistant Store Manager - Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates:
Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates!
